sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79642" key="parisw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρῐσ-ώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n79642.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">after the manner of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πάρισα </foreign>(<cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πάρισος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Vit.Isoc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.257</biblScope> </bibl> W.</sense> </entryFree>
